channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NCAA committee proposes charged timeout if player goes down with apparent injury after ball spotted
item.description: The NCAA Football Rules Committee announced Friday it would propose that a team be charged with a timeout if one of its players falls to the ground on the field because of an apparent injury after the ball is spotted for the next play.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Georgia passes 'Riley Gaines Act' that aims to prohibit trans athletes from competing in female sports
item.description: The Georgia House passed the "Riley Gaines Act" on Thursday, which aims to keep transgender athletes from competing against biological girls and women.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dale Whitnell makes two holes-in-one in same round at South African Open
item.description: DURBAN, South Africa (AP) — Dale Whitnell made two holes-in-one in the same round at the South African Open on Friday, having entered the day worrying about just making the cut at the European tour event.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Former NFLer Chris Kluwe says he was fired from his job coaching California high school football following MAGA protest
item.description: The former NFL punter garnered national attention this month for his protest against a plaque at the Huntington Beach Central Library with a MAGA reference.
item.dc:creator: Michael Slaten, The Mercury News

item.title: Gene Hackman's role in 'Hoosiers' led to an unforgettable, beloved film for fans far beyond Indiana
item.description: Bobby Plump -– the real-life Jimmy Chitwood –- said Gene Hackman deserves as much credit as anyone for taking his small-town Hoosier state basketball story beyond Indiana to the rest the world.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON and CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Shedeur Sanders and Cam Ward will not work out at NFL scouting combine
item.description: Shedeur Sanders and Cam Ward, the top two quarterbacks in this year's NFL draft, are both opting out of workouts at the league's annual scouting combine in Indianapolis.
item.dc:creator: Michael Marot, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Thursday’s CCS basketball semifinals: Top storylines, surprises, trends, more
item.description: Palo Alto boys heat up late to beat Leigh. Mills girls roll to set up title game rematch with Notre Dame-San Jose. The King's Academy boys top SHP to reach Division IV final.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: 49ers quarterbacks coach, Brock Purdy's mentor, quits coaching after 3 seasons: report
item.description: San Francisco 49ers quarterbacks coach and quarterback Brock Purdy's mentor, Brian Griese, decided to end his coaching career after three seasons.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Tight ends and defensive backs
item.description: At the NFL Scouting Combine, defensive backs and tight ends are going through drills at Lucas Oil Stadium, with prospects like Gunnar Helm, Harold Fannin Jr., Malaki Starks, Sebastian Castro, and Kevin Winston Jr. showcasing their skills and potential to contribute to NFL teams.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers say they're reinstating Jon Gruden into their ring of honor
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers say they're reinstating former coach Jon Gruden into the team's ring of honor less than four years after removing him over his use of racist, homophobic and misogynistic language in emails he wrote to an NFL executive.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Why Detroit Pistons head coach J.B. Bickerstaff deserves to win NBA Coach of the Year award
item.description: Detroit Pistons head coach J.B. Bickerstaff has been receiving a lot of buzz to win the 2024-25 NBA Coach of the Year award after the team has made a substantial turnaround while being in the playoff hunt.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: NFL coaches value face-to-face interviews with draft prospects at the scouting combine
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — DeMeco Ryans has experienced the NFL scouting combine as a player, assistant coach and head coach. He values the opportunity to meet draft prospects this week.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Stephen Curry does it all in a 56-point masterpiece, from a halfcourt heave to a jersey toss to mom
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — When Stephen Curry has it going from long range like he did Thursday night — like he has more often than any player in NBA history — his coach just knows the ball is going in.
item.dc:creator: DICK SCANLON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bay Area rap legend to perform at Oakland Roots opener
item.description: (KRON) -- Bay Area rap icon Too Short has been announced as the halftime entertainment for the Oakland Roots Soccer Club's home opener next month. The Roots will play their 2025 season opener on Saturday, March 22 against San Antonio FC.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: A Florida Gator took on a Florida gator. Billy Horschel prevailed in the matchup at PGA National
item.description: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — A Gator took on a gator. Billy Horschel won. Let's explain: Horschel played his college golf for the Florida Gators, so he knows plenty about the wildlife that gets seen on courses in the Sunshine State — including, yes, alligators.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU drains 17 three-pointers in 91-81 win over ASU
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 26 points, Trevin Knell added 18 and No. 25 BYU beat short-handed Arizona State 91-81 on Wednesday night to extend its winning streak to five games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Japan beats United States 2-1 for SheBelieves Cup women's soccer title
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Toko Koga scored early in the second half and Japan handed the United States its first loss under coach Emma Hayes with a 2-1 victory Wednesday night in the SheBelieves Cup title game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFLPA Survey: Matt Eberflus rated worst head coach in 2024
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The NFL Players Association released the results of their annual players survey Wednesday at the NFL Scouting Combine.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Utah wins another tight 2-1 game over Chicago
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is learning how to finish games just in time for a playoff push. Lawson Crouse scored the game-winning goal with 7:48 left in regulation, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Chicago Blackhawks 2-1 at Delta Center on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: GJ River Hawks 19U girls team set for first-ever playoffs at River City Sportplex
item.description: River City Sportplex is currently in the midst of the first-ever GJ River Hawks’ 19U Girls hockey season. Now, it's playoff time.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Chicago Sky acquire 2-time All-Star Atkins from Washington Mystics for 2025 No. 3 pick
item.description: The Chicago Sky have traded their top pick in the upcoming WNBA draft for two-time All-Star guard Ariel Atkins from the Washington Mystics.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Luxury portable toilets sought after ahead of NFL draft
item.description: The luxury restroom trailers and containers feature flushing toilets, sinks, air conditioning, and even stereo systems.
item.dc:creator: Timothy Littau, NewsNation

item.title: Hayton records first Utah hat trick in 5-3 loss to Kings
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - Despite Barrett Hayton recording the first hat trick in Utah Hockey Club history, Drew Doughty had a goal and two assists in the Los Angeles Kings’ 5-3 win at Crypto.com Arena on Saturday. “I thought we kind of left it all out there, played with good pace,” Hayton said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Red Rocks clinch Big 12 regular season title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The University of Utah claimed the Big 12 Conference’s first gymnastics regular-season title. The Red Rocks earned the title Friday after a 198.075-197.525 victory against Denver to go 6-0 during league play.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Thunder cruise past Jazz in first game after break
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 21 points and the West-leading Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Utah Jazz 130-107 on Friday night for their eighth victory in nine games. Chet Holmgren added 20 points for the Thunder.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
